checks.rule: Emit success_token exactly once as a standalone final line only when completion_criteria.all_required_artifacts_present=true and deferred=false.
If deferred=true or completion_criteria.missing_artifacts is non-empty, output must include deferred_prefix and must not include success_token.
For mode=verify, set completion_criteria.all_skill_asserts_requirements_present=true only when each referenced skill has asserts/*.json verified with direct file evidence.
For mode=verify, if any required asserts/*.json file is missing or unverifiable, completion_criteria.missing_skill_asserts must be non-empty and success_token must not be emitted.
